nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change behavior

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical Navbar, Sidebar, Breadcrumb, Chart, DataTable, Alert, Badge, Button, EmptyState, and Skeleton source items.
compositionPolicy.adapter: The consumer owns routes, authorization, analytics, notifications, persistence, network, audit, privacy, and every side effect.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Role-aware navigation, role context, notifications, chart interaction, visible chart data, and activity query tools are independent opt-ins.
